creator: amarat@ksu.ru
text:
well, for russian language we have about 6 different charsets, 
including, but not limited to koi8-r, utf-8, cp1251... and somehow 
subtitles even for different parts for the same video are in different 
charsets, so, it is veru useful to set, e.g.

subcp=enca:ru:utf-8

in ~/.mplayer/config

than guess what charset should I use this time, and set subcp each time 
accordingly, moreover, while I can almost certainly say what charset is 
used in a particular subtitle, sometimes even I wonder what should I use 
for subcp ;)

Shortly, this dependency will ease use of mplayer for languages with 
different charsets.

-- 
SY, Marat
